text: Coffee comes from coffee beans which are the seeds inside the red fruit of the coffee plant grown in tropical regions around the world
Pizza originated in Naples Italy and consists of a dough base topped with tomato sauce cheese and various toppings
The Eiffel Tower was built in Paris France in eighteen eighty nine for the World's Fair and stands three hundred meters tall
Basketball was invented in eighteen ninety one by James Naismith as an indoor sport to keep athletes active during winter
Sushi is a Japanese dish made with cooked rice combined with vinegar and topped with raw fish vegetables or other ingredients
Chocolate is made from cacao beans fermented dried and roasted to create a sweet product consumed worldwide
Bicycles have two wheels connected by a frame and chains and are powered by human pedaling for transportation
The Great Wall of China was built over many centuries as a defensive structure spanning thousands of kilometers
Tea is a beverage made by steeping dried leaves of the tea plant in hot water and comes in many varieties like green black and herbal
Pasta is an Italian staple food made from wheat flour and water formed into various shapes like spaghetti penne and ravioli
Cats are domesticated carnivorous mammals that have lived with humans for thousands of years as pets and hunters
Books are bound collections of pages with written or printed text that convey stories information and knowledge
Bread is a staple carbohydrate food made by baking a mixture of flour water and yeast or other ingredients
The Statue of Liberty is a colossal monument located in New York harbor symbolizing freedom and democracy
Soccer is a popular team sport where two teams of eleven players try to kick a ball into the opposing goal
Ice cream is a frozen dessert made from cream milk sugar and flavorings that comes in countless flavors
Dogs are domesticated carnivorous mammals known for their loyalty and are commonly kept as pets and working animals
Hamburgers consist of a ground beef patty between two bread buns often served with toppings like lettuce tomato and cheese
Big Ben is a famous clock tower in London England built in eighteen fifty nine and stands at the Palace of Westminster
Apples grow on trees in temperate climates and are a popular fruit eaten fresh or used in cooking and baking
Trains are large vehicles that run on railroad tracks and transport passengers and cargo over long distances
Oranges are citrus fruits rich in vitamin C grown in warm climates and eaten fresh or squeezed into juice
Tennis is a racquet sport played between two players or four players on a rectangular court with a net dividing the sides
Jeans are durable pants made from denim fabric invented in the eighteen hundreds and now a casual wardrobe staple
Honey is a sweet viscous substance produced by bees from nectar and stored in honeycombs for food
Pencils are writing instruments made with a wooden shaft and a graphite core used for writing and drawing
Rice is a grain crop that serves as a staple carbohydrate food for billions of people especially in Asia
Bananas are tropical fruits with soft yellow skin and creamy flesh rich in potassium and popular worldwide
Newspapers are printed publications containing news stories and articles distributed daily to readers
Milk is a white liquid produced by mammals to feed their young and is consumed by humans as a beverage and ingredient
Cheese is a dairy product made from milk curdled with enzymes and aged to develop flavor and texture
Roses are flowering plants with fragrant blooms commonly given as gifts to express love and affection
Swimming is a physical activity and sport where people move through water using various strokes and techniques
Potatoes are starchy root vegetables that grow underground and are used in countless dishes around the world
Cars are motorized vehicles with four wheels used for transportation of people and goods on roads
Eggs are oval shaped objects produced by birds containing yolk and white used in cooking and baking
Carrots are orange root vegetables rich in vitamin A commonly eaten raw cooked or in salads
Shoes are footwear designed to protect feet and provide comfort while walking running or other activities
Tomatoes are red fruit vegetables used in cooking salads sauces and countless cuisines worldwide
Bicycles are human powered vehicles with two wheels chains and pedals used for transportation and recreation
Hats are head coverings worn for protection from weather fashion or as part of uniforms
Fishing is an activity where people catch fish using rods nets traps or other methods for food or sport
Guitars are stringed musical instruments with a wooden body played by plucking or strumming the strings
Camping is an outdoor activity where people stay overnight in tents or shelters in natural areas for recreation
Soap is a cleaning product made from oils and alkali used for washing hands body and clothing
Beds are furniture for sleeping consisting of a frame mattress and bedding providing comfort and rest
Clocks are devices that display time using hands numbers or digital displays
Cooking is the process of preparing food by heating it using techniques like frying boiling baking or grilling
Umbrellas are portable devices held overhead to protect from rain and sometimes sun
Windows are openings in walls that allow light and air to enter buildings and permit viewing outside
